So my characters are really strong

BiS Support
Clementine, works at E0 and effiency improves with every following Enlightenment
BiS Shielder
Castor at E0, with E3 become a viable DPS / Sub DPS Option
BiS DPS
Kath / Pollux 
Needs E3, but when they do they both become one of the highest Damage dealing characters out there
Unique Discard Team
Corposant, ideally wants E2 to be effective as a Tank / Sub DPS and E3 to become a strong DPS Option
To help you pick

What is real mastery?
Specific realm boosts
You can read up on them for each realm
Me when my friend played Genshin for one day more but because I immediately had an autistic connection to Tartaglia, I built him like a beast (at the time) And surpassed them, they were mad
A okok,
For warp, it gives a percent chance to add insight to hand at beginning of turn

its a stat that does different things depending on your current realm

if you click on the realm icon in the team info screen it tells you what realm mastery does for each realm
it also says in "team info" when you click on the realm mastery stat

I am a new player progressing through the story, just starting chapter 4. So far, I've been able to get along pretty well using just a few characters (tawil's six wings has carried me a lot, since I double cast it and get lots of one time effects), but the last boss I beat strained the limits of my current strategy. How are you meant to deal 200,000 damage or whatever in an efficient way?
what team u run?
having played slay the spire, I feel like the answer ought to lie in scaling damage
Could be covenants, wheels and/or comp itself
right now I'm running tinct, ramona, tawil, and mouchette

ok so this is a tawil issue

tawil doesnt scale, she combos, and she has a fixed upper limit to the dmg she can deal with one combo

so how much your tawil can clear is tied to tawil levels and stats and nothing else
it could also be a skill issue cause comboing consistently takes a lot of practice
and is non-deterministic
I combo pretty much every turn one in ultra space
I have an intrinsic rouse + tiny wish so I'm always at 100 alimus at the beginning of each combat
u need to be playing like 6 copies of 4 wings into 4 copies of 6 wings
in a combo turn
are you doing that
lemme think. It's usally more like 4 copies of six wings
causing me to run out of gas
4 wings are the most important part because they stack temp str
without it you deal no damage
that makes sense, however, I do a decent job of ensuring I have temp strenth
mouchette also lacks synergy with tawil
I use tincts uh, what's it called,
requiem?
yeah thanks
4 wings is 4 times the temp str
yeah, that makes sense, 4 wings is definitely better but harder to set up
so yea
I'm mostly using ultra realm storage as my combo setup
i would swap mouchette to like karen
posse to mouse's wisdom
if you have casiah she works great for card selection
the ONLY thing that matters for tawil is setting up and then executing the burst combo
The most popular realm for tawil is actually aequor because if you are in red tentacle stance during burst turn, every wing hit gets a followup tentacle hit
and theres a bunch of really good dps cards you can grab off tawil exalt
example team is tawil, g!ramona, karen, caecus
I see, thank you for the advice, I tried scanning through the characters searching for more synergy but there's just so much info at once, I couldn't decide what to use my guarenteed awakens on
with mouse posse
caecus is there for vulnerable on exalt which also makes your damage go further

You can read up her sidestory as well
which shares progression but has a different move set
